title: Generated CLI Progressive Maturity For Issue 641
goal: Implement #641 and its child issues (#642, #643, #644) using the package's progressive-maturity model and high-assurance workflow.
non_goals: Do not promote mutation-capable generated adapters before dry-run, preflight, refusal, and review-gate conformance exist.
Do not make Node or Docker required for ordinary Python development.
Do not move runtime primitive behavior into generated adapter code.

intent.outcome: Generated CLI adapters become the interface authority for the first proven root and package-local read-only commands, with remaining command families routed through explicit progressive-maturity follow-up.
intent.constraints: Use checked-in planning, preserve runtime primitive ownership, keep generated outputs derived from contracts/IR, and report dogfooding findings through the host-repo template.
intent.latitude: Promote commands only to the maturity level their proof supports; create or update child issues for expansion lanes that are not safe to promote yet.
intent.escalation: Stop and route follow-up if a command needs new runtime primitive boundaries, lifecycle mutation gates, or cross-package changes beyond the planned surfaces.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed execplan after the branch is pushed.
execution.proof: Focused generated-adapter proof, conformance registry tests, Node-backed root package conformance, generator freshness, lifecycle dry-run/refusal conformance, and full make check passed through the #642/#643/#644 implementation slices.

invariants: Generated parser/help/dispatch wiring is derived from command_package_ir.json.
Hand-written CLI code owns runtime primitive behavior only after generated parser/dispatch accepts a promoted command.
Progressive maturity is explicit per target and command family.
Mutation-capable generated adapters remain deferred until required conformance exists.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Finish the migration to single-source generated executable adapters without weakening safety boundaries.
intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: yes for the parent #641 enabling milestone; deferred maturity work remains tracked by #651, #652, and #653.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: GitHub issues #651, #652, and #653 plus this PR's review artifacts.

required_continuation.required follow-on for the larger intend: Mutation-capable lifecycle adapters remain deferred until #652/#653-style maturity proof exists; memory-only package commands remain deferred to #651.
required_continuation.activation trigger: When another command family is selected for generated adapter promotion.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Runtime-backed generated Python parser/dispatch for all root read-only/context/diagnostic commands; Planning package status/doctor/summary/report/reconcile; Memory package status/doctor/report; lifecycle dry-run/refusal conformance for #642.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Lifecycle apply/mutation generated adapters and memory-only package command names requiring package-scoped operation identity (#651).
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: High-assurance generated-adapter work must activate checked-in planning before implementation, not only during closeout.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Post-review or CI follow-up if PR #646 requests changes.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement #641 in a new branch, create a PR, use high-assurance workflow, report using the dogfooding template, implement full intent, create child issues if necessary, and implement child issues using progressive maturity.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Use the package's own planning, maturity, proof, and dogfooding surfaces while completing the generated CLI adapter migration foundation.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Promote the first root and package-local read-only commands to runtime-backed generated Python adapters, document the maturity matrix, and keep lifecycle mutation deferred behind explicit proof gates.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that the PR closes the parent enabling milestone without falsely claiming mutation-capable generated adapters are ready.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Generated CLI contracts, command-generation package, root/planning/memory CLI entrypoints, generated outputs, generated package checks, focused tests, docs/reviews, and this planning state.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Broad but bounded to generated CLI adapter migration and planning/reporting artifacts.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; make check; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "dogfooding closeout review" --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before changing unrelated CLI command behavior, lifecycle mutation semantics, package versioning, or broad docs architecture.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated schema annotation/docs cleanup, unrelated planning archive cleanup, or package-local command families not named in #642/#643/#644.

stop_conditions.stop when: Generated adapters begin owning runtime behavior or mutation-capable routes without the required maturity proof.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A command cannot be promoted without new primitive contracts or behavior changes outside the issue intent.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Validation or implementation requires unrelated package rewrites.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: make check or generated conformance reveals a failing invariant that cannot be fixed within the planned surfaces.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Complete the planned generated adapter migration foundation with high assurance.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Use package planning, progressive maturity, generated contract authority, high-assurance validation, dogfooding report, commit/push/PR.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact wording of review/report artifacts and whether a command is mature enough for the next level.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A child issue requires mutation promotion or broad CLI behavior changes beyond available proof.

adaptive_assurance.reason: The work changes shipped CLI entrypoints, generated contracts, adapter safety boundaries, package-local CLIs, and validation gates.
required_gates: generated Python parser/dispatch before handwritten parser

decision_refs: Progressive maturity keeps lifecycle mutation deferred until conformance exists.

invariant_refs: Generated adapters do not own runtime primitive behavior.

forbidden: network-dependent runtime behavior beyond GitHub issue/PR metadata

decision_refs: Use runtime-backed-read-only-adapter for first Python promotions; keep lifecycle mutation deferred.
architecture_decision_promotion.notes: A full ADR is not needed unless later commands change runtime binding semantics.

references.label: lifecycle dry-run and mutation generated-adapter migration

active_milestone.scope: Progressive generated CLI adapter maturity implementation and proof.
active_milestone.ready: Issue scope, branch, child issues, and initial implementation are available.
active_milestone.blocked: No active blocker after execplan creation.
active_milestone.optional_deps: Node and Docker availability for expanded generated package conformance.

immediate_next_action: Archive this completed execplan after the branch is pushed.
invariants: Generated interface truth stays in contracts/IR.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Python targets for root defaults/config/modules/start/summary/implement/preflight/proof/ownership/skills/report/reconcile/setup/status/doctor, Planning status, and Memory status are `runtime-backed-read-only-adapter`.
TypeScript root read-only promoted commands remain `runnable-read-only-adapter` by process handoff.

uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json
uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "dogfooding closeout review" --format json

completion_criteria: Checked-in execplan active and updated through closeout.

Generated Python CLI package parser/dispatch owns promoted command interfaces.
Generated package checks and make check pass.
Dogfooding report uses the edited host-repo template.
Branch is committed, pushed, and opened as a PR.

execution_run.handoff source: GitHub issue #641 plus user correction to use package workflow
execution_run.what happened: Root read-only/context/diagnostic commands and stable package-local read-only commands were promoted to runtime-backed generated Python adapters; lifecycle dry-run/refusal conformance was added for #642; memory-only package commands were routed to #651 because the operation registry currently assumes global/root command names.
execution_run.scope touched: Generated CLI contracts, generator, root/planning/memory CLI entrypoints, checks, tests, and review docs.
execution_run.changed surfaces: command_adapter_generation, command_package_ir, operation and conformance registries, operation primitive contracts, root/planning/memory CLI entrypoints, generated outputs, focused tests, docs/reviews, and planning state.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_adapters.py --check; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_schema_reference.py --check; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "dogfooding closeout review" --format json; make check
execution_run.result for continuation: Archive this completed execplan; PR #646 carries the branch; deferred maturity work is routed to #651, #652, and #653.
execution_run.next step: Archive this completed execplan after the branch is pushed.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve larger outcomes and checked-in planning for work whose proof or continuation would be expensive to reconstruct.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Use progressive maturity and explicit continuation surfaces.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this PR establish the generated adapter maturity path without overclaiming mutation safety?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The planned generated-adapter foundation and child slices are implemented, proved locally, pushed, and routed for remaining deferred maturity through #651, #652, and #653.

generated_closeout.authority: derived adapter; intent_satisfaction, closure_check, proof_report, durable_residue, execution_run, and execution_summary remain authoritative
generated_closeout.text:
Generated closeout adapter; structured execplan fields are authoritative.
Intent: Implement #641 and child issues using high-assurance workflow and progressive maturity, then create a PR.
Intent satisfied: yes
Archive decision: archive-and-close
Proof: Focused contract tooling, process conformance registry tests, generated package conformance with Node required, generator freshness, schema reference freshness, dogfooding closeout selectors, and full make check passed locally.
Changed surfaces: command_adapter_generation, command_package_ir, operation and conformance registries, operation primitive contracts, root/planning/memory CLI entrypoints, generated outputs, focused tests, docs/reviews, and planning state.
Durable residue: planning (#645)
Memory learning: route_to_planning
Follow-up: #651, #652, #653, #654

memory_learning_capture.future agents should not rediscover: High-assurance package work requires checked-in planning before implementation.
memory_learning_capture.reason: The learning is product workflow friction better handled by an issue/guard than by a Memory note.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Do not treat high-assurance as validation-only; activate package planning when scope spans contracts, generated outputs, package CLIs, and PR proof.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The package's own workflow is part of the proof model.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: If similar oversight recurs or a check can enforce it.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Progressive generated CLI adapter foundation for #641 with runtime-backed Python adapters for root read-only/context/diagnostic commands and stable package-local read-only commands.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Focused proof and full make check passed through lifecycle dry-run/refusal conformance.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Dogfooding report and progressive maturity review.
execution_summary.resume from: Run full closeout validation, close implemented child issues #642/#643/#644, refresh dogfooding evidence, then archive this active execplan after the branch is pushed.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: High-assurance work began without checked-in planning.
Active execplan next-action guidance is duplicated across fields and can become stale after incremental promotion.
Generated package regeneration can produce line-ending-only working-tree noise.
Package-only command names need package-scoped operation identity before Memory route-report/list-files style commands can be promoted.
Lifecycle dry-run/refusal maturity needs to be modeled separately from apply/mutation maturity.
Process conformance fixtures need setup phases for realistic installed-state lifecycle proof.
signals fixed: Created this execplan and will update planning state before continuing.
